authoredShaderContract.path: Geometry Attribute attribute_viewer_n++_ Vector → Emission Color → Material Output Surface
authoredShaderContract.browserResult: A missing named Geometry Attribute resolves to a black MeshBasic emission-equivalent material. Present valid vec3 attributes use the strict attribute-emission shader path.

browserVerification.status: The committed side-by-side browser capture reports Topology counts match Blender at 104,454 vertices / 44,423 faces and emitted no WebGL warning/error logs. The Attribute Viewer ranges render black instead of diagnostic green.

remaining: This checkpoint corrects the Attribute Viewer range only. The committed side-by-side capture makes the remaining material gap explicit: Blender's complete diagram is neutral gray, while the browser still renders green headers, black panel bodies, and white labels through its existing constant or dedicated authored-material routes. Full multi-material renderer parity is not claimed.
